title: Implementation of revised RSHE guidance
body: "An assessment of the effect that the revised guidance on ‘Relationships Education, Relationships and Sex Education (RSE) and Health Education (for introduction 1 September 2026)’ will have on groups with relevant protected characteristics.  The relevant protected characteristics, identified in the Equality Act 2010, include:   disability gender reassignment pregnancy and maternity race religion or belief sex and sexual orientation   The Department for Education has responded to a consultation on a review of statutory guidance on RSHE.  "

taxons.title: Personal, social, health and economic education
